message:
[review-fix] Reuse pandas divmod float helpers

Route Column::divmod through the same pandas-style floor-div/mod helpers used by binary arithmetic so infinite operands produce NaN/Infinity results consistently. Add a focused regression for infinite float operands.

Validation: cargo fmt --check -p fp-columnar; git diff --check -- crates/fp-columnar/src/lib.rs; ubs crates/fp-columnar/src/lib.rs; rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-columnar divmod_infinite_operands_match_pandas_float_semantics -- --nocapture; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fp-columnar --all-targets -- -D warnings; rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-columnar.
